name: Pradhan Mantri Jan Dhan Yojana (PMJDY)
description: National Mission for Financial Inclusion to ensure access to financial services, namely, a basic savings & deposit accounts.
benefits: Zero balance account, RuPay Debit Card, Overdraft facility up to ₹10,000.
eligibility: Any Indian citizen above 10 years of age.

name: Pradhan Mantri Jeevan Jyoti Bima Yojana (PMJJBY)
description: A one-year life insurance scheme renewable from year to year offering coverage for death due to any reason.
benefits: Life cover of ₹2 lakhs at a premium of ₹436 per annum.
eligibility: Savings bank account holders between 18-50 years.

name: Pradhan Mantri Suraksha Bima Yojana (PMSBY)
description: Accident insurance scheme offering accidental death and disability cover.
benefits: Cover of ₹2 lakhs for accidental death/full disability for ₹20/year.

name: Atal Pension Yojana (APY)
description: Pension scheme for unorganized sector workers.
benefits: Guaranteed minimum pension of ₹1,000 to ₹5,000 per month after age 60.
eligibility: Citizens aged 18-40 years having a savings bank account.

name: Pradhan Mantri Mudra Yojana (PMMY)
description: Scheme to provide loans up to ₹10 lakh to non-corporate, non-farm small/micro enterprises.
benefits: Loans under three categories: Shishu, Kishore, and Tarun.
eligibility: Any Indian citizen who has a business plan for a non-farm sector income generating activity.

name: Stand Up India Scheme
description: Facilitate bank loans between ₹10 lakh and ₹1 Crore to at least one SC/ST borrower and one woman borrower.
benefits: Bank loans for setting up a greenfield enterprise.
eligibility: SC/ST and/or Woman entrepreneurs above 18 years.

name: Sukanya Samriddhi Yojana
description: Small deposit scheme for the girl child launched as a part of the 'Beti Bachao Beti Padhao' campaign.
benefits: High interest rate, tax benefits, maturity amount for girl's education/marriage.
eligibility: Parents of a girl child below 10 years.

name: National Social Assistance Programme (NSAP) - Old Age Pension
description: Social security for the elderly.
benefits: Monthly pension for BPL citizens aged 60+.

name: Mahatma Gandhi National Rural Employment Guarantee Act (MGNREGA)
description: Legal guarantee for one hundred days of employment in every financial year to adult members of any rural household.
benefits: 100 days of guaranteed wage employment.
eligibility: Rural households willing to do unskilled manual work.

name: Deen Dayal Upadhyaya Grameen Kaushalya Yojana (DDU-GKY)
description: Placement linked skill development scheme for rural poor youth.
benefits: Free skill training and placement support.

name: Pradhan Mantri Kaushal Vikas Yojana (PMKVY)
description: Flagship scheme for skill training of youth.
benefits: Short term training, recognition of prior learning.

name: Ujjwala Yojana 2.0
description: Free LPG connections to women from BPL households.
benefits: Free LPG connection + refill + stove.

name: Swachh Bharat Mission (Gramin)
description: To accelerate the efforts to achieve universal sanitation coverage.
benefits: Incentive of ₹12,000 for construction of IHHL.

name: Jal Jeevan Mission
description: To provide FHTC to every rural household by 2024.
benefits: Functional tap water connection.

name: Pradhan Mantri Fasal Bima Yojana (PMFBY)
description: Crop insurance scheme for farmers.
benefits: Insurance coverage and financial support in event of crop failure.

name: Kisan Credit Card (KCC)
description: Adequate and timely credit support to farmers.
benefits: Credit for cultivation and other needs.

name: Soil Health Card Scheme
description: To issue soil health cards to farmers every 2 years.
benefits: Information on nutrient status of soil.

name: National Means-cum-Merit Scholarship
description: Scholarships for meritorious students of economically weaker sections.
benefits: ₹12,000 per annum.
eligibility: Students of Class IX having scored 55% in Class VIII, parental income < ₹3.5 Lakh.

name: Post Matric Scholarship for SC Students
description: Scholarships for SC students for post-matriculation studies.
benefits: Financial support for education.

name: Pre Matric Scholarship for OBC Students
description: Scholarship for OBC students studying in class I to X.
benefits: Financial assistance.

name: Ayushman Bharat Digital Mission
description: To develop the backbone necessary to support the integrated digital health infrastructure.
benefits: Creation of ABHA (Health ID).

name: Pradhan Mantri Matru Vandana Yojana
description: Maternity benefit program.
benefits: Cash incentive of ₹5,000 in three installments.
eligibility: Pregnant Women and Lactating Mothers (First Child).

name: Poshan Abhiyaan
description: National Nutrition Mission to improve nutritional outcomes.
benefits: Nutritional support for children, pregnant women, and lactating mothers.
eligibility: Children (0-6 years), Pregnant Women, Lactating Mothers.

name: Smart Cities Mission
description: To promote cities that provide core infrastructure and give a decent quality of life.
benefits: Improved infrastructure and services.

name: AMRUT Mission
description: Atal Mission for Rejuvenation and Urban Transformation.
benefits: Basic services (water supply, sewerage, urban transport) to households.

name: PM SVANidhi
description: Micro-credit facility for street vendors.
benefits: Working capital loan up to ₹10,000.

name: Digital India
description: Flagship programme to transform India into a digitally empowered society.
benefits: Digital services, literacy, and infrastructure.

name: UDAN Scheme
description: Ude Desh ka Aam Naagrik - Regional Connectivity Scheme.
benefits: Affordable air travel.

name: FAME India Scheme
description: Faster Adoption and Manufacturing of Hybrid and Electric Vehicles.
benefits: Subsidies on purchase of electric vehicles.

name: Khelo India
description: National Programme for Development of Sports.
benefits: Scholarships for talented players, infrastructure development.

name: Fit India Movement
description: Nation-wide movement to encourage people to remain healthy and fit.
benefits: Awareness and fitness programs.

name: Beti Bachao Beti Padhao
description: Campaign to generate awareness and improve the efficiency of welfare services intended for girls.
benefits: Improved sex ratio, education for girls.

name: One Rank One Pension (OROP)
description: Uniform pension to defence personnel retiring in the same rank with the same length of service.
benefits: Pension parity.

name: Agnipath Scheme
description: Recruitment scheme for Indian youth to serve in the Armed Forces.
benefits: Service for 4 years as Agniveers.

name: PM Vishwakarma Yojana
description: Support for traditional artisans and craftspeople.
benefits: Collateral free credit, skill training, toolkit incentive.

name: Lakhpati Didi
description: Skill development for women in SHGs to earn at least ₹1 Lakh annually.
benefits: Training in skills like LED bulb making, plumbing, drone repair.

name: PM POSHAN
description: Pradhan Mantri Poshan Shakti Nirman (formerly Mid-Day Meal Scheme).
benefits: Hot cooked meal in government schools.

name: Samagra Shiksha Abhiyan
description: Integarated Scheme for School Education.
benefits: Quality education, infrastructure, teacher training.

name: Rashtriya Vayoshri Yojana
description: Scheme for providing physical aids and assisted-living devices for Senior Citizens belonging to BPL category.
benefits: Free assistive devices like walking sticks, hearing aids.

name: Accessible India Campaign
description: Sugamya Bharat Abhiyan for achieving universal accessibility for Persons with Disabilities.
benefits: Accessible environment, transport, and ICT.

name: DDRS Scheme
description: Deendayal Disabled Rehabilitation Scheme.
benefits: Grant-in-aid to NGOs for rehabilitation of PwDs.

name: Scholarships for Students with Disabilities
description: Pre-matric, Post-matric, and Top Class Education scholarships.
benefits: Financial assistance.

name: Karnataka Gruha Jyothi Scheme
description: Free electricity up to 200 units for households in Karnataka.
benefits: Zero electricity bill for up to 200 units usage.

name: Karnataka Gruha Lakshmi Scheme
description: Financial assistance of ₹2,000 per month to the woman head of the family.
benefits: ₹2,000 monthly.
eligibility: Woman head of family in Karnataka (APL/BPL/Antyodaya).

name: Karnataka Shakti Scheme
description: Free bus travel for women in Karnataka.
benefits: Free travel in non-luxury government buses.

name: Karnataka Anna Bhagya Scheme
description: Additional 5 kg rice per person for BPL families.
benefits: Free rice/cash equivalent.

name: Karnataka Yuva Nidhi Scheme
description: Unemployment allowance for graduates and diploma holders.
benefits: ₹3,000 for graduates, ₹1,500 for diploma holders per month.
eligibility: Unemployed graduates/diploma holders of 2022-23 in Karnataka.

name: Delhi Ladli Scheme
description: Financial assistance for girl child education.
benefits: Periodic financial deposits.
eligibility: Girl child born in Delhi, family income < ₹1 Lakh.

name: Delhi Jai Bhim Mukhyamantri Pratibha Vikas Yojana
description: Free coaching for competitive exams for SC/ST/OBC/EWS students.
benefits: Free coating and stipend.

name: Maharashtra Jyotirao Phule Shetkari Karjmukti Yojana
description: Farm loan waiver scheme.
benefits: Loan waiver up to ₹2 Lakhs.

name: Maharashtra Shiv Bhojan Thali
description: Subsidized meal for ₹10.
benefits: Affordable food.

name: UP Kanya Sumangala Yojana
description: Financial assistance for girl child.
benefits: Up to ₹15,000 in phases.

name: UP Abhyudaya Yojana
description: Free coaching for competitive exams.
benefits: Free coaching classes.

name: Gujarat Vahli Dikri Yojana
description: Financial assistance to families with girl children.
benefits: ₹1.10 Lakh support.

name: Tamil Nadu Moovalur Ramamirtham Ammaiyar Higher Education Assurance Scheme
description: ₹1,000 monthly for girl students.
benefits: ₹1,000 per month.
eligibility: Girl students from govt schools in Tamil Nadu.

name: Tamil Nadu Naan Mudhalvan Scheme
description: Skill development for students.
benefits: Training and placement.
